title: Ginannia pubescens
taxonomy: Ginannia pubescens is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a member of the genus Ginannia, which is part of the order Gentianales. The family Apocynaceae is a large and diverse group of plants, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This family includes over 4,000 species of plants, many of which are found in tropical and subtropical regions. Ginannia pubescens is native to Central and South America.
uses: Ginannia pubescens is a plant species known for its potential medicinal uses, although limited information is available.
